betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Actualization. The Hyperuranion. The world of ideas.
Kashan, it holds more than this.
There seem to exist a bond to another world, one that is now long gone, taken by the beasts of the Twilight Horde. The beasts, before their ensnaring by the Twilight Demon and the Soul Fiend. An act of nature, some may say. Predators hunting pray. If both predators and pray were capable of existing in higher planes of reality, and if they both could bend space to their will.
Shadesmar, another world built as a Warren, a plane detached from space.
The creatures of this place, they found their way here now. They, unlike me, can freely travel in and out of this place; no need for a planet's worth of Dimensional Shards.
Innocent creatures, holding on to a power sought by the mightiest, and they do not abuse it. They interface with it the way a critter would with a wood's undergrowth. The Spren, creatures of the world of ideas, creatures of emotion. Creatures that exist as long as minds are capable of thinking, of wondering.
Creatures that follow sentience, who love intelligence, who love individual affirmation, so much that they often die for its sake. 
Lovers of the potential for affirmation. An affirmation I am now in dire need of.
They are the mirror of my soul, of my mind. A mind that has come to forget about itself...
